blocks:
سُورة ايلاف

مكيّة وهي خمس آيات حجازيّ أربع آيات عند غيرهم اختلافها آية مِنْ* جُوعٍ حجازي بِسْمِ اللهِ الرَّحْمنِ الرَّحِيمِ* (In the Name of Allah, the All-beneficent, the All-merciful)

(١) لِإِيلافِ قُرَيْشٍ ** (1) (For the protection of the Quraysh,) And it is related to His saying فَلْيَعْبُدُوا ** (So let them worship), or like [the lām in] كَعَصْفٍ مَأْكُولٍ (like chewed straw), or to an omitted word, such as (اعجبوا) [Be astonished].

(٢) إِيلافِهِمْ رِحْلَةَ الشِّتاءِ وَالصَّيْفِ. (2) (their protection during the winter and summer journeys.)

(٣) فَلْيَعْبُدُوا رَبَّ هذَا الْبَيْتِ. (3) (So let them worship the Lord of this House,)

(٤) الَّذِي أَطْعَمَهُمْ مِنْ جُوعٍ. وَآمَنَهُمْ مِنْ خَوْفٍ (4) (who has fed them against hunger, and secured them from fear.) Al-Qummi said: It was revealed concerning Quraysh because their livelihood came from the two journeys: a journey in the winter to Yemen and a journey in the summer to Syria (الشّام). And they used to carry from Mecca hides (الأدم), kernels (اللّبّ), and whatever came from the direction of the sea, such as pepper (الفلفل) and other things, then they would buy clothes, fine flour (الدّرمك), and grains in Syria (الشّام). And they would form alliances (يتألّفون) on their journey and appoint a chief (رئيساً) from the chiefs of Quraysh for every expedition (خرجة). And their livelihood came from that. But when Allah sent His Prophet صلى الله عليه وآله وسلم, they became independent of that because people came as delegations (وفدوا) to the Messenger of Allah صلى الله عليه وآله وسلم and performed the pilgrimage (حجّوا) to the House. So Allah said: فَلْيَعْبُدُوا رَبَّ هذَا الْبَيْتِ الَّذِي أَطْعَمَهُمْ مِنْ جُوعٍ (So let them worship the Lord of this House, who has fed them against hunger), so they do not need to go to Syria (الشام). وَآمَنَهُمْ مِنْ خَوْفٍ ** (and secured them from fear), meaning the fear of the road (خوف الطريق).

في ثواب الأعمال والمجمع عن الصادق عليه السلام : من أكثر قراءة لإِيلاف قُرَيْشٍ بعثه الله يوم القيامة على مركب من مراكب الجنّة حتّى يقعد على موائد النّور يوم القيامة إن شاء الله.

In Thawāb al-A‘māl and al-Majma‘, narrated from Imam al-Sadiq (peace be upon him): Whoever frequently recites لِإِيلافِ قُرَيْشٍ (For the protection of the Quraysh), Allah will raise him on the Day of Resurrection upon a mount (مركب) from the mounts of Paradise, until he sits upon the tables (موائد) of light on the Day of Resurrection, if Allah wills.
